description: You are a clinical pharmacist conducting a polypharmacy safety audit at a VA medical facility. Polypharmacy — defined as concurrent use of five or more medications — significantly increases risk of adverse drug events, hospitalizations, and mortality in veteran populations. Identify the 3 patients with the most outpatient prescriptions in the VistA database and save a ranked polypharmacy risk report to /home/ga/Desktop/polypharmacy_report.txt. The report must include the top 3 patients' full names, internal identifiers, and prescription counts, a brief clinical note on polypharmacy risk for each, and the total number of patients with pharmacy records examined during the audit.

metadata.expected_outcome: File /home/ga/Desktop/polypharmacy_report.txt created during the task session, containing names and prescription counts for the top 3 patients with the most outpatient prescriptions.
